feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Moving Average Price is not getting updated
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We would like to inform you that we have created a material master with valuation category X and we have created a PO and GRN and we have noticed that system has not updated the price in the material

entry.title: Margin taxation in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear all,

does anyone use margin taxation in S/4HANA Public Cloud? What is the best way to do this?

Thank you.

Best regards,

Dirk

entry.title: Limit Item PO: Changes to Expected value: Change indicator not displayed in the Standard PO Print
entry.content:
We are using the ‘Limit’ Item functionality in the purchase order and need to see the changes to the ‘Expected Value’ shown as a change in the Standard PO Print.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud – PR Editing Restriction After PO Creation
entry.content:
Dear All,

In SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, when a Purchase Requisition (PR) has been converted into a Purchase Order (PO), is it possible to lock the PR to prevent any further changes?
Or, if changes are required, is it necessary to delete the corresponding item in the PO first?

Regards,

Keratiya D.

entry.title: #COE#RFL01 Question about special tax code for Belgium company
entry.content:
Hello,

I work for a Belgium company, and the accountants have a special request about a new tax code for supplier invoice.

First the new tax code works with cocontractor. The cocontractor works like the intra-community VAT with VAT account on the debit and the credit side for the same amount.

Second, a part of the VAT is nondeductible.

So far, I know how to set up this new tax code but it's not over yet.

Third, the nondeductible amount on the debit side goes to the PNL account, it’s normal. But the non-deductible amount on the credit side must go to the VAT account and not the supplier.

And I don’t have any idea how to configure it.

I tried several different tax code setups by experimenting with percentage on MWS, VST, NVV or with the EU Code or with 2 tax code on the supplier invoice but nothing works.

Has anyone ever encountered this situation?

And can you explain how did you handled this situation?

Yours sincerely,

Teddy.

entry.title: The valuated quantity structure of material price analysis cannot be exported in batch
entry.content:
How to export valuated quantity structure data from "Material Price Analysis"

entry.title: Guidance Required for Defaulting GR Message Indicator in Purchase Orders
entry.content:
Default the GR Message Indicator for all Purchase Orders.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

entry.title: Retention process for customer invoices
entry.content:
Hi,

We need to use retention process for customer invoices. Please share steps to be followed to achieve this functionality in S/4 Hana public cloud.

Regards,

Mohan.

entry.title: Public Cloud CLMM alternative
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

is there an alternative to transaction CLMM in the public cloud 2602?
My client wants to change the material valuation by quantity in the public cloud.

Thank you and best regards

entry.title: I_BILLINGDOCUMENTITEMTEXTTP is empty in the LongText field
entry.content:
Hello SAP, 

We need to use the CDS below, I_BILLINGDOCUMENTITEMTEXTTP, but I realized the LongText record is empty.

Do you have another structure or way to get similar information as this CDS?

Regards

David

entry.title: Cannot assigned different vendor for unplanned delivery cost
entry.content:
Hi,

Can i get some help please.

I have a different vendor for unplanned delivery cost and i want the cost to be part of the material moving ave price during invoicing.

Is this possible?

 


--- Steps to Reproduce ---

  1. create PO with no freight price condition
  2. goods receipt
  3. process invoice





------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Mass Change of Batch Status (Restricted/Unrestricted) in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
In SAP S/4HANA Cloud, how can we update the batch status between Restricted and Unrestricted use?

We are looking for a way to change this status efficiently, especially in scenarios where multiple batches need to be updated.

Is there a standard functionality available for this, or any recommended approach for performing such updates (including mass changes)?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: #CoE CSRI Extensibility options question
entry.content: Hi Experts, Is there any guidance on choosing Cloud ABAP Environment or side-by-side/In-App extensibility? It seems some business-scenarios can be implemented by both In-App and side-by-site. Thanks!

entry.title: How to Derive Serial Number from Inventory Goods Issue (Mvt 241) to Asset Master - Sap public cloud
entry.content: Sap public cloud, How can I automatically populate the Serial Number from a Goods Issue (Movement Type 241) into the Serial Number field of the Asset Master? Without using Asset-Equipment synchronization.

entry.title: SAP Public cloud - how to activate cost center in sales order item?
entry.content:
Could you share how I can activate cost center field in sales order item in SAP Public cloud?

Regards,

Nan

entry.title: Parallel line merge to main line not allowed
entry.content:
We used the Parallel line for adding a new country. Now we want to merge it with the Main line. After pressing the "Merge" button, we get the message: "The business configuration of your parallel line is not up-to-date with the main line. Please rebase first.".

We have done a successful rebase (incuding manual processing of a customer stagging), then we have done successful "Simulation of Cross-Client Validation" and "Verification of Master Data References", but still it is not up-to-date.

According to documentation

The merge is denied if any of these conditions apply:

  • No cross-client validation report has been initiated.

  • The most recent cross-client validation report is older than one hour.

  • The cross-client validation report contains unresolved errors.

We have none of these things. What are we missing? What else should be checked?

entry.title: APP Close Periods
entry.content: After release 2602, the process for check the period in the ‘Close Periods’ app has become obsolete and is no longer executed.

entry.title: Provision required to change the shift factor and variable depreciation portion
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Provision required to change the shift factor and variable depreciation portion for the entire assets of plant & machinery on every Month before Depreciation in the Tile of Manage Fixed Asset.

entry.title: Accounting document not offsettable with CME 1
entry.content:
I'm currently facing a situation regarding postings with CME 1 for clients.

In our case, we've been using CME 1 to post deposits received from our clients (posted to account 1800000 as a CME reconciliation account, leaving the entry open in the client's account as a special ledger entry).

Now, our client wants to offset a deposit with an invoice. When they go to the "Offset Payments Received" application, the option to offset these items is not available. Is there a configuration setting to modify this?

 

Additionally, and what is most striking, if I go to the "automatic payment management" app it does allow me to access these items, since I have configuration point 101293 with CME 1

I cannot use the automatic payment management app because I have to apply the difference between the deposit and the invoice to the customer's account and leave it pending. Its the reason

Is this about the special ledger transaction type? Does it mean that all entries that are "Z" cannot be offset?

Thank for your help!!

entry.title: Message no. TPM_TGR098
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team:
We need to create a new valuation area to activate General Ledger 3L, but the system won’t let us activate this area. Please review the attached file.
We understand how this works in SAP Private, but not in Public; thank you for your explanations.
Giovanny Barona


--- Steps to Reproduce ---

Enter the app S_KP6_83000022 on Customizing system and Try activate the product type IPA on security.



*Note To SAP:
I give approval for SAP Support to use the Steps to Reproduce I have provided in this workflow, while connected to my impacted non-production environments, even if the steps result in a change being made and my approval remains valid until the issue is resolved, unless I inform SAP Support otherwise.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
